title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 190.334 - Performance and fiscal audits authorized
text:
190.334.  Performance and fiscal audits authorized. — The state auditor shall have the authority to conduct performance and fiscal audits of any board, dispatch center, joint emergency communications entity, or trust fund established under section 190.327, 190.328, 190.329, 190.335, 190.420, 190.455, 190.460, 190.465, 190.470, or 650.325.
(L. 2017 S.B. 503 § 1, A.L. 2018 H.B. 1456)
